notes:

- Alt-tab makes the game unplayable.
- Quitting the game makes it crash.

notes: Runs great using Proton 4.2-*. I've finished the game after 5 hours. However it froze right before the climatic cinematic. I watched the scene online and feel satisfied that I've finished the game even though I can't continue to get 100% achievements (I wouldn't have bothered to anyway.) Without this issue I would've rated it "Platinum".

notes: Menu starts, but as soon as you try to start the game screen goes full white and nothing happens. You can't actually play the game at all. There seems to be a workaround, as explained by other reports here, but to make it work you need to copy files from Windows 7 installation and manually edit registry - it's quite involved and there's no guarantee it's going to work (I don't have Windows 7, Windows 10 files do not work). Unfortunately unplayable at the moment.

notes:
Used the tweak suggested by everyone else: (https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install). Game ran absolutely faultlessly, up until the climactic cutscene, which didn't trigger, and the game softlocked with the character stuck in place and unable to move with nothing happening. After shutting the game down and continuing from the previous checkpoint, second time around the cutscene triggered correctly, and I was able to complete the game.

Decided to give Gold, as Steam discussions threads seem to indicate this might be an actual bug with the game rather than a Steam Play problem (see [story spoilers] https://steamcommunity.com/app/683320/discussions/0/1741104717711908303/ and https://steamcommunity.com/app/683320/discussions/0/1649919326326047294/).
title: GRIS

title: GRIS

notes:
GRIS runs perfectly after using the mentioned workaround: https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install. While installing the workaround, however, there was this issue when running this line: WINEPREFIX="/home/YOUR_USERNAME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/751440/pfx" ./install-mf.sh. The error says it was not possible to find /home/YOUR_USERNAME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/751440/pfx/drive_c/windows/syswow64. I did a quick search for this directory with: find /home/YOUR_USERNAME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/751440/pfx -name syswow64.
In my systems, there were four results. I ran the installation command again using all existing directories, replacing only the numeric ID 751440 with the correct ones. Then it worked fine.
title: GRIS

notes: GRIS runs perfectly after using the mentioned workaround: https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install. While installing the workaround, however, there was an issue when running this line: WINEPREFIX="/home/USERNAME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/751440/pfx" ./install-mf.sh. The error message said it was not possible to find /home/USERNAME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/751440/pfx/drive_c/windows/syswow64. I did a quick search for this directory with: find /home/USERNAME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata -name syswow64. In my system, there were four results. I ran the installation command again using all existing directories, replacing only the numeric ID 751440 with the correct ones. Then it worked fine.
